Created: 30-04-26 15:06:13

App Analyzer

Technical Documentation


This technical documentation serves as a comprehensive guide to understanding the structure, components, and functionalities of the Qlik App. It provides detailed insights into the data model, script transformations, calculated measures and dimensions, sheets, associated visualizations, and variables utilized within the application. The documentation is generated directly from the app metadata using DocuGen, ensuring accuracy and reliability.


  • Jump to app

General Information

This section provides essential details and statistics regarding the App, including its name, description, unique ID, ownership information, creation, modification, and reload times, as well as its size in the system.


Application details:

Name:
App Analyzer
Description:
The App Analyzer provides comprehensive analysis of Qlik Cloud Analytics application metadata on Qlik Cloud. Available at https://github.com/qlik-oss/qlik-cloud-app-analyzer. {v6.6.0}
ID:
439e7e79-3405-4227-aac2-f854e909858c
Resource Type:
app
Usage:

Measures

This section presents each user-defined measure with its business label, description, calculation format, technical name, and corresponding tags. By exploring these details, users can gain a deeper understanding of the measures employed within the application and their significance in driving analytical insights.


Avg Sheet View Duration CM

(measure)

Label:
Avg Sheet View Duration CM
Description:
ID:
0ece90b2-c0b8-4e2a-a3d4-0bafb182edb2
Definition:

Interval(Avg({}SheetConsumptionOrderDuration))
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Interval
Format:

h:mm:ss
Color:

Tags:

Concurrent Users by App

(measure)

Label:
Concurrent Users by App
Description:
ID:
10179e43-a332-4c1f-97dc-dd8059f3a837
Definition:

Max( Aggr( Count({}DISTINCT SessionUserID), ConsumptionConcurrencyMinute, AppID ) )

Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Fix
Format:

#,##0
Color:

Tags:

Avg Sheet View Duration CM vs PMTD

(measure)

Label:
Avg Sheet View Duration CM vs PMTD
Description:
ID:
195964ce-4337-4157-91cd-272a031c2243
Definition:

Interval([Avg Sheet View Duration CM] - [Avg Sheet View Duration PMTD])
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Interval
Format:

h:mm:ss
Color:

Tags:

Avg Session Duration CM

(measure)

Label:
Avg Session Duration CM
Description:
ID:
2301d1d5-c4cc-409d-b960-35d9ed0d64e4
Definition:

Dual(Time(Frac(Avg({}SessionDurationInterval))),Avg({}SessionDurationMS))
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Concurrent Sessions by App PM

(measure)

Label:
Concurrent Sessions by App PM
Description:
ID:
23668356-ac25-4e52-a4b4-57126e0c70f8
Definition:

Max( Aggr( Count({}DISTINCT SessionID), ConsumptionConcurrencyMinute, AppID ) )
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Fix
Format:

#,##0
Color:

Tags:

Description:

25ee5714-977c-47d4-82a4-a7f1e6f3d3af

Tags:

Avg App RAM Footprint (GB)

(measure)

Label:
Avg App RAM Footprint (GB)
Description:
(Average) The memory footprint of an app when reloaded. Note that in practice, this is the baseline memory consumed by an app. As users make selections and navigate the app, additional memory will be cached by the app.
ID:
28fd9f54-9e0c-4983-a0a5-fbd982e4b744
Definition:

Num(Avg(AppRAM_GB),'#,##0.0#')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

App Reload Peak RAM Against Quota

(measure)

Label:
App Reload Peak RAM Against Quota
Description:
The peak RAM used in an application's reload against the set quota, which is 5 GB.
ID:
APQFj
Definition:

Num(Sum(AppRAMPeakReload_Byte)/$(vAppRAMPeakReloadSizeQuota),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Synthetic Fields

(measure)

Label:
Synthetic Fields
Description:
Fields which are common across more than one table, thus creating a synthetic key.
ID:
LyyD
Definition:

Num(Count({0"}>}DISTINCT FieldID),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

App Reload Peak RAM (MB)

(measure)

Label:
App Reload Peak RAM (MB)
Description:
The peak memory that an application consumes on reload, which can be significantly higher than the base RAM footprint due to temp RAM utilized for additional calculations, aggregations, memory intensive functions (think rand()), etc.
ID:
MHfcB
Definition:

Num(Sum(AppRAMPeakReload_MB),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

#65d3da

App RAM Size % Against Quota

(measure)

Label:
App RAM Size % Against Quota
Description:
ID:
MkmsBv
Definition:

If(AppRAMSizeQuota<>'Unlimited',Num(Round(Avg(AppRAMPercentToQuota),.01),'##0%'),'Unlimited')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Days Since Last Reload

(measure)

Label:
Days Since Last Reload
Description:
How many days since the last reload of this app?
ID:
MmPwnGq
Definition:

Num(Date('$(vStartTimeGMTOffset)')-Date,'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

None
Tags:

Last Used Ago (Day Hour:Min)

(measure)

Label:
Last Used Ago (Day Hour:Min)
Description:
ID:
QEEV
Definition:

Interval(Date('$(vStartTimeGMTOffset)')-Max(SessionStartTime),'d hh:mm')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Field RAM Footprint (MB)

(measure)

Label:
Field RAM Footprint (MB)
Description:
Initial memory consumed by a field within an during reload. In aggregate, this total Field RAM footprint might be larger than the total App RAM footprint due to fields existing on more than one table. (Measure shading / coloring relative to the max value found for this measure in your current selections.)
ID:
QKkunQj
Definition:

Num(Sum(FieldSize_MB),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

#26a0a7
Tags:

Fields Over Record Threshold

(measure)

Label:
Fields Over Record Threshold
Description:
ID:
QhHwRqJ
Definition:

Num(Count({}DISTINCT FieldID),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Quota: Shared Spaces

(measure)

Label:
Quota: Shared Spaces
Description:
ID:
RApX
Definition:

If(Only({}QuotaSpace)<>'Unlimited',Avg({}QuotaSpace),Only(QuotaSpace))
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Table Rows Exceeded

(measure)

Label:
Table Rows Exceeded
Description:
ID:
SBUCJ
Definition:

Count({} DISTINCT TableID)
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

#a54343
Tags:
alert

Apps Contain Data Island(s)

(measure)

Label:
Apps Contain Data Island(s)
Description:
Count of apps which contain one or more island tables in the data model. An island table is one which does not share any common field with another table and, therefore, is not associated with other data tables.
ID:
TMkjfM
Definition:

Count({<[AppContainsDataIsland(s)]={1}>}DISTINCT AppID)
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Quota: App In-Memory Size (MB)

(measure)

Label:
Quota: App In-Memory Size (MB)
Description:
ID:
UapeyK
Definition:

If(Only({} Quota_MB) <> 'Unlimited',Avg({} Quota_MB), Only(Quota_MB))
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Total Table RAM Footprint (MB)

(measure)

Label:
Total Table RAM Footprint (MB)
Description:
Net impact to RAM for a table in an app. (Measure shading / coloring relative to the max value found for this measure in your current selections.)
ID:
XLGbrd
Definition:

Num(Sum(TableSize_MB),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

App RAM Footprint (MB)

(measure)

Label:
App RAM Footprint (MB)
Description:
The memory footprint of an app when reloaded. Note that in practice, this is the baseline memory consumed by an app. As users make selections and navigate the app, additional memory will be cached by the app.
ID:
a2d994eb-b418-457f-826e-1512bb4caba0
Definition:

Num(Sum(AppRAM_MB),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown

Color:

App Contains Synthetic Keys

(measure)

Label:
App Contains Synthetic Keys
Description:
Indicates if an app's data model contains one or more synthetic keys. A synthetic key is created when two or more fields are found in two or more tables within an app data model.
ID:
eZJJSjQ
Definition:

Num(Count({<[AppContainsSyntheticKeys]={1}>}DISTINCT AppID),'#,##0')

Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Field Cardinality

(measure)

Label:
Field Cardinality
Description:
Cardinality is a measure of uniqueness of field values. Higher cardinality means more unique field values, which generally results in higher memory utilization.
ID:
gjpZqpd
Definition:

Num(Sum(FieldCardinality),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

App Contains Circular Reference(s)

(measure)

Label:
App Contains Circular Reference(s)
Description:
The number of apps that contain circular references (loops) in their data models.
ID:
mjCu
Definition:

Count({<[AppContainsCircularReference(s)]={'Has Circular Reference(s)'}>} DISTINCT AppID)
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

#a54343
Tags:
alert

App Contains Data Island(s)

(measure)

Label:
App Contains Data Island(s)
Description:
The number of apps that contain data islands (tables that are not associated to any other tables within the data model).
ID:
tmjp
Definition:

Count({<[AppContainsDataIsland(s)]={'Has Island Table'}>} DISTINCT AppID)
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

#a54343
Tags:
alert

Island Tables

(measure)

Label:
Island Tables
Description:
Count of tables within an app which are "islands", meaning that they are not associated with any other table in the data model.
ID:
uGWVjpe
Definition:

Num(Sum(TableIsIsland),'#,##0')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Reload CPU Time

(measure)

Label:
Reload CPU Time
Description:
Engine CPU time spent during last app reload, given in milliseconds (ms). Note: this is not the same as Reload Duration reported in other Monitor Apps, but is specific to the time that the engine spent to reload the app.
ID:
vvuJJXF
Definition:

Time([App Reload CPU Time (ms)]/86400000,'hh:mm:ss')
Expression:
Grouping:
No
Custom Formatted:
Yes
Format Type:
Unknown
Format:

Color:

Tags:

Dimensions

Within the Qlik App, user-defined dimensions are fundamental components for categorizing and organizing data, enabling deeper insights into various facets of business operations. This section serves as a comprehensive compilation of data concerning the user-defined dimensions. Each dimension is presented with its business label, description, calculation format, technical name, and corresponding tags. By exploring these details, users can gain a comprehensive understanding of the dimensions employed within the application and their significance in facilitating data analysis and visualization.

Field is Synthetic

(dimension)

Label:
Field is Synthetic
Description:
Indicates if a field is part of a synthetic key. A synthetic key is created when two or more fields are found in two or more tables within an app data model. Note that Synthetic Fields will be listed as having 0 field records. Please rely on the field cardinality to understand the volume of records for these synthetic fields.
ID:
ZJjue
Definition(s):

FieldIsSynthetic
Grouping:
No
Tags:

App Contains Data Island(s)

(dimension)

App Contains Data Island(s)

pbcfKp

No

Variables

This section compiles comprehensive details for each variable, including its unique identifier, title, definition, developer comments, and corresponding tags. By understanding the role and usage of these variables, users can effectively leverage their capabilities within the application.


file_size_ExportFromApp

vRollingLineMeasure

(variable)

ID:
efc0986b-ecf6-4685-81fd-b84ee8ad2d85
Definition:

If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)',num(Round(Avg({<[AppRAM_MB - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppRAM_MB - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','), If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)',num(Round(Avg({<[AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','), If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows',num(Round(Avg({<[AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','), If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields',num(Round(Avg({<[AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','), If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Tables',num(Round(Avg({<[AppNoOfTables - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppNoOfTables - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','), If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)',Interval(Round(Avg({<[App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling]-={0}>}[App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling])/1000)/(60*60*24),'hh:mm:ss')))))))
Comment:
Tags:

=Max(Aggr([Exports Image/PDF],AppID))

(variable)

c88f8416-0298-4b8b-8557-d00b689f0877

(variable)

3b19ec89-fd54-4efd-bf66-cfdcd76c9640

(variable)

7e97ce9d-43c8-41cb-8e61-21418d505bff

f875e7f7-f734-488c-ba14-055ae78871bb

Sheets and Visualizations

This section provides a comprehensive exploration of the various sheets within the Qlik App, accompanied by insights into their purpose, visualization layout, and the data insights they offer. Each sheet is presented with its unique identifier, a brief description, and details regarding the number and types of objects it contains. Additionally, individual visualizations are highlighted, showcasing their identifiers, titles, types, and the measures/dimensions utilized, if applicable.


App RAM to Quota

(sheet)

  • Jump to sheet
Type:
Community sheet (managed space)
ID:
08d57bbb-e093-440a-9c84-3c078804f593
Description:
Grid Resolution:
customrows
Sheet Mode:
responsive
Objects:
  • barchart: 3
  • filterpane: 1
  • sn-nav-menu: 1

Visualization No. 1

  • jump to object
Type:
table
ID:
XNYUJ
Title:

='RAM Quotas'
Subtitle:

='Base RAM Footprint (MB): ' & If(GetPossibleCount(AppRAMSizeQuota)=1,If(IsNum(AppRAMSizeQuota),AppRAMSizeQuota/1024/1024,AppRAMSizeQuota),'') & '; Peak Reload RAM (MB): ' & $(vAppRAMPeakReloadSizeQuota)/1024/1024
Dimensions:
App Name (Master Dimension):

AppNameUnique



Space Name (Master Dimension):

SpaceName



App Base RAM (MB):

=Num(AppRAM_MB, '#,###.','.',',')
Measures:
App RAM Size % Against Quota (Master Measure):

If(AppRAMSizeQuota<>'Unlimited',Num(Round(Avg(AppRAMPercentToQuota),.01),'##0%'),'Unlimited')



App Reload Peak RAM (MB) (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(AppRAMPeakReload_MB),'#,##0')



App Reload Peak RAM Against Quota (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(AppRAMPeakReload_Byte)/$(vAppRAMPeakReloadSizeQuota),'#,##0')

Visualization No. 2

  • jump to object
Type:
barchart
ID:
KQRkN
Title:

# Applications by % App Base RAM to Quota
Color Mode:
byExpression
Color Definition:

If(IsNull(Avg(_AppRAMPercentToQuotaColor)),$(c_green_breeze_alpha(Avg(AppRAMPercentToQuota)+50/Avg(AppRAMPercentToQuota))),$(c_red_breeze_alpha(Avg(_AppRAMPercentToQuotaColor))))
Dimensions:
% App RAM to Quota Buckets:

=Num(Subfield(Class(AppRAMPercentToQuota,.1),' <= x',1), '##0%') & ' <= x < ' & Num(Subfield(Class(AppRAMPercentToQuota,.1),' x < ',-1), '##0%')



Measures:
Apps:

Num(Count({}AppRAMPercentToQuota))"}>}DISTINCT AppID),'#,##0') + Sum({1}AppRAMPercentToQuota))"}>} 0)

Visualization No. 3

  • jump to object
Type:
barchart
ID:
euNa
Title:

# Applications by % App Reload Peak RAM to Quota
Color Mode:
byExpression
Color Definition:

If(IsNull(Avg(_AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuotaColor)),$(c_green_breeze_alpha(Avg(AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuota)+50/Avg(AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuota))),$(c_red_breeze_alpha(Avg(_AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuotaColor))))
Dimensions:
% App RAM to Quota Buckets:

=Num(Subfield(Class(AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuota,.1),' <= x',1), '##0%') & ' <= x < ' & Num(Subfield(Class(AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuota,.1),' x < ',-1), '##0%')



Measures:
Apps:

Num(Count({}AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuota))"}>}DISTINCT AppID),'#,##0') + Sum({1}AppRAMPeakReloadPercentToQuota))"}>} 0)

Visualization No. 4

  • jump to object
Type:
filterpane
ID:
MChPACj

  • jump to object

sn-nav-menu

psjaZe

15665f10-262e-47bf-aaaf-b1181e5c6018

Visualization No. 1

  • jump to object
Type:
linechart
ID:
QtfrkWT
Title:

='Rolling App Metadata Changes: ' & '$(vRollingLineSelect)'
Subtitle:

Only includes Apps for which measures have data for.
Color Mode:
byDimension
Color Definition:

{'qStringExpression': {'qExpr': "'App Name'"}}
Dimensions:
App Rolling Timestamp (Master Dimension):

AppRollingTimestamp



App Name:

=If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)' AND Aggr(Sum([AppRAM_MB - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)' AND Aggr(Sum([AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows' AND Aggr(Sum([AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Tables' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNoOfTables - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)' AND Aggr(Sum([App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName))))))
Measures:
$(vRollingLineMeasureLineChart):

$(vRollingLineMeasureLineChart)

Type:
pivot-table
ID:
PHxDDVJ
Title:

='Rolling App Metadata Changes: ' & '$(vRollingLineSelect)'
Subtitle:

Only includes Apps for which measures have data for.
Dimensions:
App Name:

=If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)' AND Aggr(Sum([AppRAM_MB - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)' AND Aggr(Sum([AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows' AND Aggr(Sum([AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Tables' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNoOfTables - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName, If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)' AND Aggr(Sum([App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName))))))



App Rolling Timestamp (Master Dimension):

AppRollingTimestamp
Measures:
$(vRollingLineMeasure):

$(vRollingLineMeasure)



If( Avg( Aggr( Round(($(vRollingLineMeasure)/Above($(vRollingLineMeasure)) - 1) * Avg(1),.01), (AppName, (Text, Ascending)), (AppRollingTimestamp, (Numeric, Ascending)) ) )=0,Null(), Avg( Aggr( Round(($(vRollingLineMeasure)/Above($(vRollingLineMeasure)) - 1) * Avg(1),.01), (AppName, (Text, Ascending)), (AppRollingTimestamp, (Numeric, Ascending)) ) ) ):

If( Avg( Aggr( Round(($(vRollingLineMeasure)/Above($(vRollingLineMeasure)) - 1) * Avg(1),.01), (AppName, (Text, Ascending)), (AppRollingTimestamp, (Numeric, Ascending)) ) )=0,Null(), Avg( Aggr( Round(($(vRollingLineMeasure)/Above($(vRollingLineMeasure)) - 1) * Avg(1),.01), (AppName, (Text, Ascending)), (AppRollingTimestamp, (Numeric, Ascending)) ) ) )

Visualization No. 7

  • jump to object
Type:
table
ID:
vDFnc
Title:

App Summary
Subtitle:

='Thresholds >> ' & 'App Base RAM (MB): ' & If(GetPossibleCount(AppRAMSizeQuota)<>1,'',If(AppRAMSizeQuota='Unlimited',AppRAMSizeQuota,Num(AppRAMSizeThreshold/1048576,'#,##0'))) & '; ' & 'Peak Reload RAM (MB): ' & Num((AppRAMPeakReloadSizeThreshold/1024/1024),'#,##0') & '; Total Records: ' & If(GetPossibleCount(AppRecordCountThreshold)<>1,'',num(AppRecordCountThreshold,'#,##0')) &'; Total Fields: ' & If(GetPossibleCount(NoOfFields)<>1,'',num(NoOfFields,'#,##0')) &'; Reload CPU Time (minutes): ' & If(GetPossibleCount(ReloadCPUTimeThreshold)<>1,'',num(ReloadCPUTimeThreshold/60000,'#,##0'))

Dimensions:
App Name (Master Dimension):

AppNameUnique



Space Name (Master Dimension):

SpaceName



Space Type (Master Dimension):

SpaceType



App Type (Master Dimension):

AppType



App Owner (Master Dimension):

AppOwnerName



Last Reload (Date) (Master Dimension):

Date
Measures:
App RAM Footprint (MB) (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(AppRAM_MB),'#,##0')



App RAM Size % Against Quota (Master Measure):

If(AppRAMSizeQuota<>'Unlimited',Num(Round(Avg(AppRAMPercentToQuota),.01),'##0%'),'Unlimited')



App Reload Peak RAM (MB) (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(AppRAMPeakReload_MB),'#,##0')



App Reload Peak RAM Against Quota (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(AppRAMPeakReload_Byte)/$(vAppRAMPeakReloadSizeQuota),'#,##0')



Table # Records (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(TableNoOfRows),'#,##0')



# Tables (Master Measure):

Num(Count(DISTINCT TableID),'#,##0')



# Fields (Master Measure):

Num(Count(DISTINCT FieldID),'#,##0')



Synthetic Fields (Master Measure):

Num(Count({0"}>}DISTINCT FieldID),'#,##0')



App Contains Circular Reference(s) (Master Measure):

Count({<[AppContainsCircularReference(s)]={'Has Circular Reference(s)'}>} DISTINCT AppID)



Island Tables (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(TableIsIsland),'#,##0')



Reload CPU Time:

Interval([App Reload CPU Time (ms)]/86400000,'hh:mm:ss') //Time([App Reload CPU Time (ms)]/86400000,'hh:mm:ss')

  • jump to object
Type:
table
ID:
e976aac3-ab2d-43eb-916d-8a2eb0d6871a
Title:

Table Summary
Subtitle:

='Threshold >> Table Record Count: ' & If(GetPossibleCount(TableRecordCountThreshold)<>1,'',num(TableRecordCountThreshold,'#,##0'))
Dimensions:
App Name (Master Dimension):

AppNameUnique



Table Name (Unique) (Master Dimension):

TableNameUnique



Table is Island (Master Dimension):

TableIsIsland
Measures:
Total Table RAM Footprint (MB) (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(TableSize_MB),'#,##0')



Table # Records (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(TableNoOfRows),'#,##0')



Table # of Fields (Master Measure):

Num(Sum([Table Total # of Fields]),'#,##0')



Synthetic Fields (Master Measure):

Num(Count({0"}>}DISTINCT FieldID),'#,##0')

Visualization No. 12

  • jump to object
Type:
table
ID:
1cd525e2-231e-4075-9a2c-6314fb4b36f2
Title:

Field Summary
Subtitle:

='Thresholds >> Record Count: ' & If(GetPossibleCount(FieldValueCountThreshold)<>1,'',num(FieldValueCountThreshold,'#,##0')) & '; Field Cardinality: ' & If(GetPossibleCount(FieldCardinalityThreshold)<>1,'',num(FieldCardinalityThreshold,'#,##0'))
Dimensions:
App Name (Master Dimension):

AppNameUnique



Table Name (Unique) (Master Dimension):

TableNameUnique



Field Name (Master Dimension):

FieldNameUnique



Field is Synthetic (Master Dimension):

FieldIsSynthetic
Measures:
Field RAM Footprint (MB) (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(FieldSize_MB),'#,##0')



# Field Records (Master Measure):

Num(Sum(FieldTotalCount),'#,##0')

Deprecated charts

(sheet)

  • Jump to sheet
Type:
Community sheet (managed space)
ID:
8c28f7cd-340b-44df-bd69-a8f2d694d5f2
Description:
Occasionally, Qlik needs to deprecate old charts. This sheet tracks events generated when users access sheets containing these charts.
Grid Resolution:
customrows
Sheet Mode:
responsive
Objects:
  • sn-table: 2
  • kpi: 5
  • barchart: 1
  • action-button: 1
  • filterpane: 1
  • sn-nav-menu: 1

Visualization No. 1

  • jump to object
Type:
sn-table
ID:
CUwxbA
Title:

='Deprecated chart events (' & COUNT(DISTINCT {} DeprecatedChartsEventID) & ' events)'
Dimensions:
App:

=AppNameUnique & ' [' & AppID & ']'



Space:

=SpaceName & ' [' & SpaceType & ']'



Sheet:

=DeprecatedChartsSheetTitle & ' [' & DeprecatedChartsSheetID & ']'



Approved sheet:

DeprecatedChartsSheetApproved



Published sheet:

DeprecatedChartsSheetPublished



Chart:

=IF(LEN(DeprecatedChartTitle)<0,DeprecatedChartTitle,'[Untitled]') & ' [' & DeprecatedChartID & ']'



Chart Type:

DeprecatedChartType



In container?:

DeprecatedChartInContainer



Owner:

=DeprecatedChartsOwnerName & ' [' & DeprecatedChartsOwnerID & ']'
Measures:
Last impacted session:

=TimeStamp(Max(DeprecatedChartsEventTime),'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss')

Visualization No. 2

  • jump to object
Type:
kpi
ID:
jVaZXxG
Measures:
Impacted apps:

COUNT(DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsAppID)



Last 7 days:

COUNT({}DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsAppID)

Visualization No. 3

  • jump to object
Type:
kpi
ID:
CgyJW
Measures:
Impacted sheets:

COUNT(DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsAppSheetID)



Last 7 days:

COUNT({}DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsAppSheetID)

Visualization No. 4

  • jump to object
Type:
kpi
ID:
JQhCsU
Measures:
Impacted users:

COUNT(DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsUserID)



Last 7 days:

COUNT({}DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsUserID)

  • jump to object
Type:
kpi
ID:
pkdCJ

COUNT({}DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsAppChartID)

kpi
ID:
GyDPks

  • jump to object
Type:
barchart
ID:
QXbJNWU
Title:

Deprecated chart events over time
Color Mode:
primary
Dimensions:
Month:

=Date(MonthStart(DeprecatedChartsEventTime))
Measures:

Count(DISTINCT DeprecatedChartsAppID)

Visualization No. 8

  • jump to object
Type:
sn-table
ID:
HTkk
Title:

='Apps opened with deprecated charts (' & COUNT(DISTINCT {} DeprecatedChartsAppID) & ' apps)'
Subtitle:

'Deprecated charts are logged when a sheet is opened. Removing a chart from an app will not remove events relating to that object, so use the last impacted session date to determine event freshness. Deleted apps are excluded.'
Dimensions:
App:

=AppNameUnique & ' [' & AppID & ']'



Space:

=SpaceName & ' [' & SpaceType & ']'
Measures:
Last impacted session:

=TimeStamp(Max(DeprecatedChartsEventTime),'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss')

='Green values depict apps that have been reloaded on a Qlik tenant or on June ' & chr(39) & '18+, while light grey values depict apps that have not.'

byExpression

Dimensions:
App Name:

AppNameUnique



User:

SheetConsumptionUserName



Session ID (Master Dimension):

SessionID



Sheet ID:

SheetConsumptionSheetID



Sheet Title (Master Dimension):

SheetConsumptionTitle



Nav Event Time:

=TimeStamp(SheetConsumptionEventTime,'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss')



Nav Event End Time:

SheetConsumptionEventEndTime



Nav Order:

=[SheetConsumptionOrder]



Sheet View Duration:

=Interval(SheetConsumptionOrderDuration,'hh:mm:ss')



Sheet State:

=SheetConsumptionState



Session Start Time:

=TimeStamp(SessionStartTime,'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss')



Session End Time:

=TimeStamp(SessionEndTime,'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss')



Sheet Link:

SheetConsumptionLink



Sheet Not Accessed In Over 30 Days (Master Dimension):

SheetNotAccessedInOver30Days

SheetNotAccessedInOver60Days



Sheet Not Accessed In Over 90 Days (Master Dimension):

Session End Time:

=TimeStamp(SessionEndTime,'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss')



Session ID (Master Dimension):

SessionID



Session Has Edit Mode:

=Pick( Match( Alt( Aggr( Count(DISTINCT {} SessionID), SessionID ), 0 ), 1,0 ), 'True','False' )
Measures:
Exports (Master Measure):

Count(DISTINCT ExportFromAppTransactionID)



Exports Data (Master Measure):

{} [Exports]



Exports Image/PDF (Master Measure):

{} [Exports]

Avg Session Duration (Master Measure):

Dual(Time(Frac(Avg(SessionDurationInterval))),Avg(SessionDurationMS))

Visualization No. 1

  • jump to object
Type:
sn-text
ID:
jEqWE
Measures:
If($(vu_slim_version_for_anonymous)=1 AND $(vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back)<>-1,'This application is currently in the slimmed down mode for an anonymous-enabled tenant. This is to reduce the overall size of the application''s RAM footprint so that it has a marginal effect on the capacity quota of the tenant. Some sheets are not available while in this mode and are greyed out. In addition, this application is currently in batch mode for reloading app metadata. App metadata must be fully loaded for analysis. Once batch reloading is completed, ensure that the ''vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back'' is set back to ''-1'' to complete the process. At that point, select metadata analysis can be viewed in this application.', If($(vu_slim_version_for_anonymous)=1,'This application is currently in the slimmed down mode for an anonymous-enabled tenant. This is to reduce the overall size of the application''s RAM footprint so that it has a marginal effect on the capacity quota of the tenant. Some sheets are not available while in this mode and are greyed out.', If($(vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back)<>-1,'This application is currently in batch mode for reloading app metadata. App metadata must be fully loaded for analysis. Once batch reloading is completed, ensure that the ''vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back'' is set back to ''-1'' to complete the process. At that point, metadata analysis can be viewed in this application.', ''))):

If($(vu_slim_version_for_anonymous)=1 AND $(vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back)<>-1,'This application is currently in the slimmed down mode for an anonymous-enabled tenant. This is to reduce the overall size of the application''s RAM footprint so that it has a marginal effect on the capacity quota of the tenant. Some sheets are not available while in this mode and are greyed out. In addition, this application is currently in batch mode for reloading app metadata. App metadata must be fully loaded for analysis. Once batch reloading is completed, ensure that the ''vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back'' is set back to ''-1'' to complete the process. At that point, select metadata analysis can be viewed in this application.', If($(vu_slim_version_for_anonymous)=1,'This application is currently in the slimmed down mode for an anonymous-enabled tenant. This is to reduce the overall size of the application''s RAM footprint so that it has a marginal effect on the capacity quota of the tenant. Some sheets are not available while in this mode and are greyed out.', If($(vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back)<>-1,'This application is currently in batch mode for reloading app metadata. App metadata must be fully loaded for analysis. Once batch reloading is completed, ensure that the ''vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back'' is set back to ''-1'' to complete the process. At that point, metadata analysis can be viewed in this application.', '')))

huFpAr
Title:

App Analyzer App Info
Dimensions:
Dimension:

=ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')
Measures:
Measure:

=If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='Data Last Reloaded',TimeStamp(ReloadTime() + $(vReloadTimeDiffFromGMT)), If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='QVD Current Volume (in Days)',Floor(Max({1}SessionStartTimeDate)) - Floor(Min({1}SessionStartTimeDate))+1, If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='Current Version','v$(app_version)', If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='Latest Version','$(vLatestVersion)'))))

Type:
table
ID:
zrDqddP
Title:

QVD Sizes
Dimensions:
QVD:

=ValueList( 'app_analyzer_AppRAM_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_AppReloadCPUMetadata_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_Consumption_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_Fields_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_FieldSourceTables_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_FieldTags_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_ServerHardware_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_Tables_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_LargeAppConsumption_$(app_schema_version).qvd', 'app_analyzer_rolling.qvd', )

File Size (MB):

Container Visualization No. 1

  • jump to object
Type:
table
ID:
1a7cdcdd-af08-4e87-b0f8-e6277ed946a0
Title:

App Sessions & User Activity
Subtitle:

'Sessions ranging from ' & Min(SessionStartTimeDate) & ' through ' & Max(SessionEndTimeDate)
Dimensions:
App Name (Master Dimension):

AppNameUnique
Measures:
Sessions (Master Measure):

Count(DISTINCT SessionID)



Sessions (Master Measure):

Count(DISTINCT SessionID)



Large App Sessions (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionID)



Large App Denials (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionID)



Users (Master Measure):

Count(DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Users (Master Measure):

Count(DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Users CM:

Dual(Num([Users CM],'#,##0') & If([Users PMTD]<>0,$(i_up_down([Users CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Users CM])



Users PMTD (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Users PM (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Concurrent Users:

[Concurrent Users by App]



Concurrent Users CM:

Dual(Num([Concurrent Users by App CM],'#,##0') & If([Concurrent Users by App PMTD]<>0,$(i_up_down([Concurrent Users by App CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Concurrent Users by App CM])



Concurrent Users PMTD:

[Concurrent Users by App PMTD]



Concurrent Users PM:

[Concurrent Users by App PM]



Concurrent Sessions:

[Concurrent Sessions by App]



Concurrent Sessions CM:

Dual(Num([Concurrent Sessions by App CM],'#,##0') & If([Concurrent Sessions by App PMTD]<>0,$(i_up_down([Concurrent Sessions by App CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Concurrent Sessions by App CM])



Concurrent Sessions PMTD:

[Concurrent Sessions by App PMTD]



Concurrent Sessions PM:

[Concurrent Sessions by App PM]



Avg Session Duration (Master Measure):

Dual(Time(Frac(Avg(SessionDurationInterval))),Avg(SessionDurationMS))



Avg Session Duration CM:

Dual([Avg Session Duration CM] & If(NOT IsNull([Avg Session Duration PMTD]) AND NOT Text([Avg Session Duration PMTD])='00:00:00',$(i_up_down([Avg Session Duration CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Avg Session Duration CM])



Avg Session Duration PMTD (Master Measure):

Dual(Time(Frac(Avg({}SessionDurationInterval))),Avg({}SessionDurationMS))



Avg Session Duration PM (Master Measure):

Dual(Time(Frac(Avg({}SessionDurationInterval))),Avg({}SessionDurationMS))



Last Used Ago (Day Hour:Min) (Master Measure):

Interval(Date('$(vStartTimeGMTOffset)')-Max(SessionStartTime),'d hh:mm')



Users Last 7 Days (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Users Last 30 Days (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Users Last 60 Days (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Users Last 90 Days (Master Measure):

Count({}DISTINCT SessionUserID)



Sheets Viewed:

[Sheets Viewed]



Sheets Viewed CM:

Dual(Num([Sheets Viewed CM],'#,##0') & If([Sheets Viewed PMTD]<>0,$(i_up_down([Sheets Viewed CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Sheets Viewed CM])



Sheets Viewed PMTD:

[Sheets Viewed PMTD]



Sheets Viewed PM:

[Sheets Viewed PM]



Avg Sheet View Duration:

Dual(Time(Frac(Avg(SheetConsumptionOrderDuration))),Avg(SheetConsumptionOrderDuration))



Avg Sheet View Duration CM:

Dual([Avg Session Duration CM] & If(NOT IsNull([Avg Sheet View Duration PMTD]) AND NOT Text([Avg Sheet View Duration PMTD])='00:00:00',$(i_up_down([Avg Sheet View Duration CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Avg Sheet View Duration CM])



Avg Sheet View Duration PMTD:

[Avg Sheet View Duration PMTD]



Avg Session Duration PM:

[Avg Sheet View Duration PM]



Avg Sheets Viewed by Session:

[Avg Sheets Viewed by Session]



Avg Sheets Viewed by Session CM:

Dual(Num([Avg Sheets Viewed by Session CM],'#,##0') & If([Avg Sheets Viewed by Session PMTD]<>0,$(i_up_down([Avg Sheets Viewed by Session CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Avg Sheets Viewed by Session])



Avg Sheets Viewed by Session PMTD:

[Avg Sheets Viewed by Session PMTD]



Avg Sheets Viewed by Session PM:

[Avg Sheets Viewed by Session PM]



Exports (Master Measure):

Count(DISTINCT ExportFromAppTransactionID)



Exports Data (Master Measure):

{} [Exports]



Exports Image/PDF (Master Measure):

{} [Exports]



Exports CM:

Dual(Num([Exports CM],'#,##0') & If([Exports PMTD]<>0,$(i_up_down([Exports CM vs PMTD (Indicator)])),$(i_up_down(0))),[Exports CM])



Exports PMTD:

[Exports PMTD]



Exports PM:

[Exports PM]



Days Since Last Reload (Master Measure):

Num(Date('$(vStartTimeGMTOffset)')-Date,'#,##0')
